title: Backend Engineer
jd_text:
Tech Innovations Ltd is at the forefront of digital transformation, helping businesses embrace cutting-edge technologies. We are seeking a Backend Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and maintaining our backend services, primarily using nodejs. 

**Responsibilities:**
- Design and implement scalable backend systems.
- Collaborate with front-end developers to integrate user-facing elements.
- Troubleshoot and optimize existing services.

**Requirements:**
- Strong experience with Node.js and RESTful APIs.
- Familiarity with database technologies such as MongoDB or PostgreSQL.
- Excellent problem-solving skills.

**Benefits:**
- Hybrid working model: 2-3 days in the office per week.
- Use of GitHub Copilot to enhance your coding productivity.
- Competitive salary range of £75,000-£95,000.

title: Senior Node.js Engineer
jd_text:
Digital Solutions Group is a leading provider of innovative digital solutions, dedicated to helping companies succeed in the digital landscape. We are looking for a Senior Node.js Engineer to lead our backend development team. 

**In this role, you will:**
- Architect and develop scalable applications using NodeJavaScript.
- Mentor junior developers and foster a collaborative environment.
- Engage with stakeholders to ensure alignment with project goals.

**Requirements:**
- Proven experience in backend development with Node.js.
- Expertise in microservices architecture.
- Strong leadership and communication skills.

**Benefits:**
- Hybrid working: 2-3 days in office per week.
- Basic salary of £100,000-£120,000.
- Access to Cursor for enhanced coding efficiency.
